steps.title: Read the given slope
steps.content: The equation $y=4x+20$ is in slope-intercept form, so line $k$ has slope $4$.

steps.title: Use the perpendicular rule
steps.content:
Perpendicular lines have slopes that are opposite reciprocals. The opposite reciprocal of $4$ is
$$-\frac{1}{4}$$
The answer is A.
